zh.lifeSummary: 當Mallt ferch Morgan於大約1474年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根阿-培連時，她的父親Morgan ap Llewelyn25歲，母親Elen ferch Iorwerth22歲。她和Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan至少有10個兒子和4個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mallt ferch Morgan于大约1474年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根阿-培連时，她的父亲Morgan ap Llewelyn25岁，母亲Elen ferch Iorwerth22岁。她和Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan至少有10个儿子和4个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Mallt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Maud , a common name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Mallt ferch Morgan was born about 1474, in Aber-pergwm, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Morgan ap Llewelyn, was 25 and her mother, Elen ferch Iorwerth, was 22. She had at least 10 sons and 4 daughters with Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan.

fr.of, Cemais, Montgomeryshire, Wales: Cemais, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mallt ferch Morgan est née environ 1474, à Aber-pergwm, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Morgan ap Llewelyn, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elen ferch Iorwerth, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles avec Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mallt ferch Morgan um 1474 in Aber-pergwm, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Morgan ap Llewelyn 25 und ihre Mutter Elen ferch Iorwerth 22. Sie hatte mit Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

ja.lifeSummary: Mallt ferch Morganが約1474年にウェールズグラモーガンアバー-ペルグウムで生まれた時，父Morgan ap Llewelynは25歳，母Elen ferch Iorwerthは22歳であった。彼女はLlywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychanとの間に少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Mallt ferch Morgan(이)가 대략 1474년 웨일스 글램르건 압-퍼그w에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Morgan ap Llewelyn(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elen ferch Iorwerth(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan(와)과 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mallt ferch Morgan nasceu aproximadamente 1474, em Aber-pergwm, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Morgan ap Llewelyn, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elen ferch Iorwerth, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas com Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mallt ferch Morgan родилась около 1474 г. в местности абир-пиргвм, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Morgan ap Llewelyn было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elen ferch Iorwerth, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери от Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mallt ferch Morgan nació aproximadamente 1474, en Aber-pergwm, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Morgan ap Llewelyn, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elen ferch Iorwerth, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas con Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan.
